name: sulis-product-development
description: Product development studio for the Outcome-First Methodology. Provides design, plan, implement, and complete skills for the full product delivery lifecycle. v1.2.2: cites Founder English (FE-01..FE-10) at plugins/srd/references/founder-english.md — every founder-facing chat message AND founder-readable artifact write passes the FE-06 five-point check (strip internal IDs, translate filenames, expand acronyms, strip internal taxonomy, read-aloud test). Lead with outcomes; concrete over abstract; no mechanism narration. v1.2.3: adds FE-11 (Inference Over Interrogation) citation — infer from existing context before asking the founder; never relay a specialist's 'open questions' verbatim. v1.3.0: validator-review filenames (design-validator, production-guardian, completion-validator) now use ISO 8601 UTC compact timestamps (YYYY-MM-DDTHHMMSSZ) instead of date-only stamps. Closes user feedback that same-day reruns of any validator collide. Document Date/Validation Date fields updated to match.
